entry.title: I am a real lawyer but not @haleyybaylee ‘s lawyer. Yet. This video is not legal advice just education on why this lawsuit sounds insane but could have legs. #haleybaylee #mattkalil #lawsuit #privacy #lawyer

entry.title: your landlord's lawyer wrote your lease. you signed it in 10 minutes. and then wondered why you lost your deposit. 😮‍💨 nobody taught you or your roomies how to read these things and landlords are BANKING 💸 on that. so I made something — a free PDF Space
entry.content: your landlord's lawyer wrote your lease. you signed it in 10 minutes. and then wondered why you lost your deposit. 😮‍💨 nobody taught you or your roomies how to read these things and landlords are BANKING 💸 on that. so I made something — a free PDF Space

entry.title: Send this to your friends who have tried Ozempic, Mounjaro, Wegovy… and other GLP-1s 💉 🚫 medical or legal advice, just education on lawsuits re: failure to properly disclose possible side effects #ozempic #classaction #lawsuit #mounjaro #glp1

entry.title: Send this to your friends who deserve to get what they actually want 🤝📝✨ Messy back and forths kill deal momentum and confuse everyone. Here's how I centralize everything, add context, track opens, and compare redlines with @Adobe Acrobat. Try my free PDF
